title: Disposable Endoscopes Market Size Projected to Hit USD 10.47 Billion by 2035 | SNS Insider
author: Sns Insider
description: The global disposable endoscopes market is expected to expand at a CAGR of 15.04% through 2035, driven by rising infection prevention initiatives, adoption of single-use endoscopes, and minimally invasive procedures. North America leads with 38.45% market share, while Asia Pacific records the fastest growth. Hospitals dominate the end-user segment with 55.36% market share, with ambulatory surgical centers showing the highest growth potential.

title: Explosive Growth in AI for Orthopedic Surgery Market: $0.87 Billion by 2030 at 27.2% CAGR
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The AI in orthopedic surgery market is experiencing remarkable growth with a projected CAGR of 27.2% through 2030. North America leads the market, while Asia-Pacific and Europe show growing segments despite tariff-related challenges.

title: Surgical Navigation System Report; Patent Leadership Led by the United States with 1,204 Patents In 230-Page Patent Landscape Covering Neurosurgery, Spinal, Orthopaedic, ENT, and Dental Navigation Applications
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: A comprehensive patent landscape analysis of surgical navigation systems reveals 2,524 patents filed globally from 2010-2025, with the United States leading at 1,204 patents. The global market was valued at USD 8.38 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach USD 18.47 billion by 2030 at a 14% CAGR. Key drivers include AI-guided support, augmented reality, and robotic integration, with North America dominating and Asia-Pacific as the fastest-growing region. Major players include Brainlab AG, Medtronic, and Stryker.

title: RF-Detection Report Now Available, Tracks Patent Leadership Between the United States (490 Patents) and China (479 Patents)
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: A comprehensive RF-detection patent landscape report covering 1,248 patents filed from 2010-2024 shows the US leading with 490 patents followed closely by China with 479 patents. The global RF-detection market was valued at USD 3.5 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach USD 4.6 billion by 2032 with a 6.5% CAGR. Key application areas include military, healthcare, public safety, and transportation, with North America dominating regional sales at USD 1.6 billion in 2023.

title: Microcatheter Market Size to Reach USD 1.79 Billion by 2035 | SNS Insider
author: Sns Insider
description: The global microcatheter market is valued at USD 1.05 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach USD 1.79 billion by 2035, expanding at a CAGR of 5.53%. Growth is driven by increasing adoption of minimally invasive cardiovascular and neurovascular procedures, rising prevalence of cardiovascular and neurovascular disorders, and advancements in catheter technologies. Aspiration microcatheters lead with 36% market share, while steerable microcatheters are the fastest-growing segment. North America dominates with 34% of global revenues, with Asia-Pacific emerging as the fastest-growing region.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned as a key player in the growing microcatheter market with above-market per-unit commercial value in North America's advanced interventional cardiology and neurointerventional radiology communities.

Highlighted as a major market player and specifically noted for launching the Solitaire X revascularization device with Phenom 27 microcatheter system in 2024, demonstrating active innovation and market participation.
Identified as a leading player in the microcatheter market with premium device specifications and above-market commercial value in North America's interventional cardiology sector.

Recognized as a key market player and specifically noted for launching the 3D REVASCULARIZATION catheter system in 2024, demonstrating innovation in aspiration microcatheter technology for stroke treatment.
